ab: sami ki yaya mnwah mgnaw tanux soni.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: memaw mslingaw ku babaw kayan sku slwan, ini kskinut ru ini kkilux ku kayan, memaw blay sinbehuyan nya.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: tl’ung sami babaw be’nux k’man mani sa pang, mb’ya sku hi kinmli na witux, memaw yemli.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: babw kinryax lga mtanah ku kayan la.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: p’usan mu yaya, huwa ka mtanah kayan la.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: kmayan yaya maha kyala mmwah rhuyan la.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: gbyan lga ungat yulung mki babaw kayan mhtu ku yangah la.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: mki tu’iy na ’binah sali ga, kyalun mu ku yangah.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: mwani laxiy ’wah rhuyan, smogan kung musa mgnaw tanux na.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
